title: rhagadiolus rhagadiolus
intro: Rhagadiolus rhagadiolus, also known as the 'Milk Daisy' or 'Cretan Rhagadiolus', is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Rhagadiolus rhagadiolus include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Rhagadiolus rhagadiolus include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
